meaning: n.交易,(政治上的)密约,待遇,份量,<口>买卖vi.处理,应付,做生意vt.分配,分给(out),发牌,给予
examples: Whose turn is it to deal?
He wants in on the deal.
So the government sees the relationship between citizen and state as, effectively, a deal.
Some people have complained there have been too few police to deal with the violence.
